scripts.dev:mobile: npm run build:packages && npm run start -w @matriva/mobile
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @matriva/shared && npm run dev -w @matriva/api
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @matriva/api
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @matriva/shared && npm run build -w @matriva/api-client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.lint: npm run build:packages && npm run lint --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run check:no-firebase && npm run check:secrets && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
